Working with Brenntag on a pre-project feasibility study for establishing an extra Natronlud 50% storage tank with safety stock at the Kalundborg Harbor (the current one is also used by Novonesis). It is expected to be done by March 2025, and then we can take a decision based on the estimated costs to move forward with construction of the tank and a new supply agreement. 

Estimated costs of the pre-project feasibility study is DKK 70.000 – 150.000.

The Rationale for the contract is following:
To ensure availability to bigger volumes and access to safety stock to support NN volume growth and mitigate stock out risk (NN is single sourced on Natronlud 50%.).
The old contract from 1999 will be updated with an additional storage tank at Kalundborg harbor and this will include establishing a safety stock of 2.500 MT covering 6 months consumption in 2026.
